name: fleece aries
longDescription: A fleece of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: From a look it resembles the Golden Fleece that exists in the Greek myths.

name: key
longDescription: The key to the coffin is lying here
extraDescr:
Neat you have the key to the coffin...is is a soft orange color
and burns in your hand a bit.

name: scroll
longDescription: A runed scroll.

name: sword thin
shortDescription: an extremely sharp and thin sword
longDescription: Light glints off the edge of a razor-sharp sword.
extraDescr:
The sword is forged from a strange silvery metal.  It barely measures an inch
across at its widest point, yet it is totally inflexible and razor-sharp.  It
could probably cut through stone.

name: cloak stained
longDescription: A worn and stained cloak is crumpled up on the floor.

name: bow energy strange
longDescription: A strange energy bow lies here.

name: hoof taurus
longDescription: A hoof of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: It is with these hooves that Taurus can stand against Orion's attacks.

name: rathcor
shortDescription: a hidden compartment in the room

name: gloves dragon
shortDescription: a pair of dragon skin gloves
longDescription: A pair of dragon skin gloves are lying on the ground.

name: sword thin two two-handed
longDescription: A heavy yet thinly bladed two-handed sword lies here.
extraDescr:
The sword is forged from a strange silvery metal.  It barely measures two inches
across at its widest point, yet it is totally inflexible and razor sharp.  It
could probably cut through stone.

name: bracer leather enchanted
longDescription: A leather bracer with mystic symbols sits here.
extraDescr: This bracer is covered with runes of protection and luck in combat.

name: scroll encrypted
longDescription: An encrypted scroll lies at your feet.

name: mask gemini
longDescription: A mask of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr:
You notice the mask has got two faces, one smiling and the other crying.
You don't know which way you should wear it.

name: rusty sword curved scimitar
longDescription: A sword has been left lying here
extraDescr:
Very rusty and old...it has a wide blade and chunks missing from
its cutting edge.

name: sword silvery two-handed
longDescription: A silvery sword gleams unnaturally with an alien light.
extraDescr:
The sword is forged from a strange silvery metal the likes of which you have
never seen in your own world.  It is incredibly sharp and hard, yet feels almost
fluid to the touch.

name: helm dragon
longDescription: A helm made of a dragon's skull is lying on the ground.

name: knife dagger
longDescription: A wide-bladed knife sits undisturbed on the floor.
extraDescr:
It's very sharp, you suspect this knife is more effective than many swords.
It appears to be of elvish origins, and is made of finely crafted mithril,
with a stylized ivory hilt.

name: chest
longDescription: An iron bound chest with a shiny lock sits here.

name: shell cancer
longDescription: A shell of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr:
A shell which is dented in the middle, resulting from the Hercules' mighty
pound when the Crab was still an enemy of Hercules in ancient times.

name: piece slime
longDescription: You step on a piece of slime...your foot squishes a bit
extraDescr:
ICK! This is a piece of slug-like brownish green slime...
Blech!

name: fur cloak
longDescription: A large mound of fur is lying here.

name: flail barbed iron
longDescription: A rusty iron flail with wicked barbs on it tears at the ground.
extraDescr:
This hideous weapon has claimed many lives.  You can tell from the bloodstains
dried into the iron and from the residue of flesh that hangs from the many
barbs on it.

name: knife dagger
longDescription: A wide-bladed knife sits undisturbed on the floor.
extraDescr:
It's very sharp, you suspect this knife is more effective than many swords.
It appears to be of elvish origins, and is made of finely crafted mithril,
with a stylized ivory hilt.

name: key golden
longDescription: A shiny golden key lies here.

name: skin leo
longDescription: A skin of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: A skin made of metal, which was worn by Hercules during his Ten Labours.

name: smock
longDescription: An artist's smock is lying here on the floor.
extraDescr:
It has paint and little shavings of different materials all over it.
It is very old an smells of paint, mildew, and rot.

name: leggings dragon scale
shortDescription: a pair of dragon scale leggings
longDescription: A pair of dragon scale leggings is lying on the ground.

name: sword gith two-handed
shortDescription: the unholy sword of the githyanki
longDescription: You feel tendrils of evil emanating from a wicked blade.
extraDescr:
The blade of this sword is a featureless gray.  As you touch it you feel an
evil presence reaching out to consume your soul.

Maybe picking it up wasn't such a good idea.

name: bracelet copper
longDescription: A tarnished copper bracelet lies at your feet.

name: bracelet virgo
longDescription: A bracelet of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: A bracelet of purity and youth, only worn by selected virgins.

name: scroll tightly rolled
longDescription: A yellowing tightly rolled scroll is here
extraDescr:
It is tightly wound. The writing on the inside when opened up is very
unreadable but the scroll has a seal on it with a grey :

88
88
8888  8888
88
88

name: sleeves dragon scale
shortDescription: a set of dragon scale sleeves
longDescription: A set of dragon scale sleeves is lying on the ground.

name: stone flame
longDescription: The room is lit by a hot blue flame coming from a small stone.
extraDescr:
This stone burns with an flame that emits great heat, yet it can be held with
ease.  The flame creates a light that allows you to see for miles.

name: gem ruby
longDescription: A large ruby lies on the ground collecting dust.

name: scale libra
longDescription: A shield of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: It is a shield of justice, used in the ancient battle against injustice.

name: auburn orb
longDescription: An orb is here
extraDescr:
You gaze into the orb and are almost lost in the swirling mists of color
inside of this rare and beautiful object.

name: whip dragon tail
longDescription: A dragon tailed whip is lying on the ground.

name: powder astral
longDescription: Twinkling powder floats before your eyes.
extraDescr: You see the residue of the astral plane.

name: gem diamond glittering
longDescription: A glittering diamond lies at your feet.

name: scale libra
longDescription: A shield of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: It is a shield of injustice, it picks on the innocent.

name: bar gold
longDescription: A bar of gold is lying here
extraDescr:
A nice little brick of gold...very dusty and old... it has some emblem
on it...The emblem is a large 'J'

name: vest splint
longDescription: An intricately fashioned splint mail vest lies here.
extraDescr:
This splint mail has been expertly and ornately fashioned from the highest
quality of steels.

name: hammer copper
longDescription: A copper hammer is lying on the ground.

name: gem sapphire
longDescription: A brilliant sapphire lies here twinkling.

name: sting scorpio
longDescription: Sting of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr: This dreadful weapon put a lot of mortals to death before Scorpio was banished.

name: cape dark black
longDescription: A dark black cape is lying here
extraDescr:
The cape is gently flows and pulls in the light so evenly and perfectly
that the cape seems to be simply a void of blackness. It is quite beautiful

name: skirt splint
longDescription: An intricately fashioned splint mail skirt lies here.
extraDescr:
This splint mail has been expertly and ornately fashioned from the highest
quality of steels.

name: dagger silver
longDescription: A silver dagger is lying here.

name: gem lapis
longDescription: A deep blue lapis lazuli gem lies here.

name: arrow sagittarius
longDescription: The Arrow of Sagittarius lies here.
extraDescr: It's an arrow of lightning; it will never miss any target.

name: flaming black sword long longsword
longDescription: A pitch-black long swor here
extraDescr:
This sword is amazing! It almost wields itself! As you test it out, the
flames seems to roar brighter as you go thru basic swordsman routines.
it is obviously a great find!

name: sleeves splint
shortDescription: a pair of splint mail sleeves
longDescription: A pair of intricately fashioned splint mail sleeves lie here.
extraDescr:
This splint mail has been expertly and ornately fashioned from the highest
quality of steels.

name: key gold tarnished
longDescription: A tarnished gold key lies here.

name: jewel tiger
longDescription: The Tiger Jewel lies here blazing.

name: bow sagittarius
longDescription: The Titanic Bow of Sagittarius lies here.
extraDescr: The gigantic bow used by the Archer; it is a very powerful weapon.

name: sword long the
longDescription: THE long sword of Primus is here.
extraDescr:
This is an extremely long and heavy sword, with many magical runes inscribed
on it.  It glows with the power of Primus, Lord of the Plane of Nirvana.

name: breast plate dented worn
shortDescription: a worn and dented breast plate
longDescription: A piece of armour is here.
extraDescr: Though this piece of armour is worn and dented it looks very usable.

name: gauntlets ornate
shortDescription: a pair of ornately designed gauntlets
longDescription: A pair of painstakingly designed ornate gauntlets lie here.
extraDescr:
These gauntlets have been expertly and ornately fashioned from the highest
quality of steels.

name: key gold tarnished
longDescription: A tarnished gold key lies here.

name: jewel red-eyed
longDescription: The red-eyed jewel glares at you greedily.

name: horns capricon
longDescription: A pair of horns of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr:
These strange horns are the work of gods, shaped to fit on hands.
They look powerful indeed.

name: moonstone moon stone white
longDescription: A softly glowing white stone rests on the floor.
extraDescr:
Looking into the smooth surface of this moonstone, you feel strangely at
peace and balance with the world around you.

name: key silver
longDescription: You see a silver key here.

name: vest cracked leather
shortDescription: a decaying vest made from cracked leather
longDescription: A decaying hunk of cracked leather has been discarded here.
extraDescr:
The ancient vest is barely intact.  All of the leather has cracked and dried
to a husk.  It is covered with stains, burns, scorch marks, and blood.

name: gem emerald
longDescription: A fiery green emerald sits here.

name: axe lumber two-handed
longDescription: A heavy lumber axe lies here.
extraDescr: It is a heavy axe of the kind lumberjacks use to chop down trees.

name: vessel aquarius
longDescription: A vessel of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr:
This vessel has been carried by the Water Bearer ever since she came to the
Zodiac.

name: moonstone moon stone white
longDescription: A softly glowing white stone rests on the floor.
extraDescr:
Looking into the smooth surface of this moonstone, you feel strangely at
peace and balance with the world around you.

name: key silver
longDescription: You see a silver key here.

name: potion violet
longDescription: A tall glass flask holds a translucent violet fluid.
extraDescr: The violet fluid inside shifts and swirls.

name: shirt
longDescription: A chequered shirt lies here.
extraDescr: It is an extra large, chequered shirt made from heavy cloth.

name: gem emerald
longDescription: A fiery green emerald sits here.

name: tail pisces
longDescription: A fish tail of the Zodiac lies here.
extraDescr:
This tail can actually be worn by mortals somehow as leggings ... another
work of the gods.

name: troll jacket
longDescription: A Troll gang jacket has been carelessly tossed here.

name: potion vial murky
longDescription: A small vial contains a murky, sludge-like substance.
extraDescr: The murky liquid inside this vial looks a lot like sewer water.

name: boots
longDescription: A pair of leather boots lies here.
extraDescr:
They are fashioned from rough leather that has been oiled frequently to make
it stay waterproof.  They look worn but quite functional.

name: ring dignity
longDescription: A ring of specialty lies here.
extraDescr:
This ring belongs to Cassiopeia, queen of the Universe.
Mortals, do not touch!

name: ogre jacket
longDescription: An Ogre gang jacket has been carelessly tossed here.

name: potion silvery
longDescription: An octagonal vial holds a silvery-colored fluid that reflects light.
extraDescr: The octagonal vial contains a silvery-colored liquid that shimmers in the light.

name: fireplace
longDescription: A fireplace made from stone is set against the east wall.
extraDescr:
It is fashioned from stones of various sizes that have been stacked on top of
each other and fastened with mortar.  Its chimney is constructed likewise and
leads the smoke out through the low cabin ceiling.

name: sceptre might
longDescription: A sceptre of interest lies here.
extraDescr: You'd better give it back, or the king of the Universe will punish you.

name: chain
longDescription: A hefty length of chain lies in a heap here on the floor.

name: mint chocolate
longDescription: Someone has dropped a delicious-looking chocolate mint here.
extraDescr:
This mint is made from the finest of chocolates, surrounding a cool peppermint
interior that must be savored, not swallowed.

name: chest
longDescription: A wooden chest stands in the corner.
extraDescr:
It is a robust chest made from short, heavy planks that have been fastened
together with tenons.  It is equipped with a simple brass lock.

name: ring universe
longDescription: Here lies a fortune ... a small ring of power.
extraDescr: It conceals the power of the universe.

name: metal cover shield
longDescription: A garbage can lid has been dropped on the floor.

name: pentagram
longDescription: A small black metal pentagram has been left here.
extraDescr:
The pentagram is a small circular hoop that surrounds a five-pointed star.
Inscribed on its exterior loop are markings in an alien tongue.

name: key
longDescription: A small brass key lies here.
extraDescr: It is a small, simple brass key with no inscriptions or marks of any kind.

name: great dipper
shortDescription: the Great Dipper of the Skies
longDescription: A dazzling white object lies on the ground.

name: spray paint can
longDescription: A can of spray paint has been discarded here.

name: pouch rotting
longDescription: A small pouch rots away on the floor here.
extraDescr: You think you see glints of metal through the holes...

name: coins silver
longDescription: Some silver coins lie piled up in a heap on the floor.
extraDescr: The coins seem to be gold.  They are obviously valuable.

name: spring shoot
longDescription: A shoot grows here, covered with dew.

name: stiletto
longDescription: A killer stiletto has been forgotten here.

name: pouch rotting
longDescription: A small pouch rots away on the floor here.
extraDescr: You think you see glints of metal through the holes...

name: blackberries
longDescription: Some blackberries grow on a bush nearby.

name: summer flower
longDescription: A flower grows here, waiting to be picked up.

name: spiked heel boots
longDescription: A pair of black leather boots with 6 inch spikes have been left here.

name: mushroom
longDescription: A small mushroom grows nearby.
extraDescr: It is a tasty little thing.

name: autumn leaf
longDescription: A leaf lies here, as if just fallen from a tree.

name: mirror
longDescription: A small mirror has been left here.

name: winged boots
longDescription: A pair of winged boots flutters about

longDescription: A water barrel has been left here.

name: winter branch
longDescription: A branch lies here, still covered with snow.

name: gloves
longDescription: A pair of soft lined leather gloves lie here.

name: bronze bracer
longDescription: A carved bronze bracer lies here.

name: tree opening
longDescription: A colossal tree blocks the way westwards.
extraDescr:
The opening is far too narrow for you to squeeze through but it looks as if the
tree is hollow.

This enormous tree must be a thousand years old.  Its rough bark looks grey
and pale and is decorated with scratches and claw marks.  On its west side is a
small opening just above ground level.

name: chains andromeda
longDescription: Some chains lie on the floor.

name: patrol club
longDescription: A patrolman's club has carelessly been forgotten here.

name: ornate brooch
longDescription: An ornate brooch was carelessly left here.

name: branch
longDescription: A long, grey branch rests heavily on the ground.

longDescription: Some chains lie on the floor.

longDescription: Bright magenta potion gathers dust.

longDescription: A long, grey branch rests heavily on the ground.

longDescription: A set of brass knuckles left from a fight are here on the ground.

name: ancient parchment
longDescription: An ancient illustrated parchment in the corner

name: branch
longDescription: A long, grey branch rests heavily on the ground.

name: ancient parchment
longDescription: An ancient illustrated parchment in the corner

It is a large, brown boletus that must weigh nearly five pounds.  The top
surface is covered in a thin layer of transparent slime that emits a weak,
musty smell.  Not the most delicious thing you have seen.

name: key dirty
longDescription: A dirty key lies here.

white spots and the top surface is covered in a thin layer of transparent slime
that emits a weak, musty smell.  Not the most delicious thing you have seen.

name: toy boomerang
longDescription: A toy boomerang wants to be picked up.

name: ogre jacket studded
longDescription: An Ogre gang jacket with sewn-in metal studs waits for an owner.

name: potion yellow
longDescription: A yellow potion has been left here.
extraDescr: It has a deep yellow colour and and a strong spicy smell.

longDescription: A gnome sword catches your eye.

longDescription: You see some tight-fitting leather pants sitting on the ground.
extraDescr: They're worn, but they look suprisingly tough.

name: crown iron
longDescription: An iron crown rests on the ground.
extraDescr: It is a heavy human-sized crown made from solid iron.

longDescription: A studded wooden shield lies here.

name: switchblade knife
longDescription: A strange looking knife is here.

It is a quite heavy human-sized ring made from solid iron.  It lacks
decorations of any kind.

name: potion bloody
longDescription: A bloody potion lies here.

name: bottle broken
longDescription: Yowch! You cut your foot on a broken bottle.
extraDescr: It appears to be a broken wine bottle, but what do you know about brewing?

longDescription: A ring in the shape of a bat lies here.

longDescription: A beautiful iron breast plate lies here.

longDescription: An electrum sword lies here.

longDescription: A bound scroll of detection lies at your feet.

name: peanuts
longDescription: Peanuts lie here.

name: fountain
longDescription: An elaborate white marble fountain is here.
extraDescr:
You see the most beautiful fountain in the world.  The white marble glistens
as sunlight hits its wet surfaces.  Fish swim around in the inner fountain, and
an exterior fountain is reserved just for drinking.

name: grain
longDescription: There is some grain here.

name: aegis plate
longDescription: A powerful breast plate has been left here.

name: desk
longDescription: A beautiful desk made from a gigantic sea shell is here.
extraDescr:
The sea shell desk here is just gorgeous.  The creamy white of the table
surface makes you dream of being in a pool swimming among mermaids.

name: skiff
longDescription: A small skiff is here.

name: hammer thunder bolt thunderbolt
longDescription: A huge hammer has been carelessly dropped here.

name: cabinet
longDescription: A sturdy glass cabinet is here.
extraDescr:
A cabinet made of oak and mahogany, this piece of woodmanship is just splendid
to view.  The wood is varnished with a very strong stain that looks as if it
would last longer than the cabinet itself.

name: boots gnome
longDescription: You notice a pair of Gnome Boots.

name: herbs herb timian
shortDescription: a small dusk of timian herbs
longDescription: Some herbs are lying here, small green leaves and tiny pink flowers.
extraDescr: This herb smells rather spicy; maybe you should try it?

name: helmet winged
longDescription: A helmet with small wings lies here.

name: mandolin
longDescription: A mandolin lies against the wall.

name: coins
longDescription: A pile of coins.

name: herbs herb gyvel

longDescription:
Some black gyvel is lying here, dark green with black leaves and tiny

blood red flowers.
extraDescr: This herb smells rather special, but is it poisonous?

name: spear ares
longDescription: A wicked spear rests on the ground here.

name: treasure coins
longDescription: A huge treasure is lying here, looking very valuable.
extraDescr: It reads: "Hi Conan.  No more coins from here, pal. :) Signed, Redferne".
Looks like a LOT of coins.  One of them has writing on it.

name: harp golden
longDescription: A beautiful golden harp is waiting to be played.

name: coins
longDescription: A pile of coins.

name: sandals winged
longDescription: A pair of well made sandals lies here.

name: plant ivy

longDescription: Some poison ivy is growing here.
extraDescr:
This plant has dark green juicy leaves.
You notice some small white thorns on it.

together with tenons.  It is equipped with a simple brass lock.

name: flute silver
longDescription: A brilliant silver flute glimmers from its holster.

name: shield stone
longDescription: A stone slab lies here.

name: staff ivory
longDescription: An ivory staff.

name: blood jar
longDescription: A small jar in a dark, red colour.

occult origin.

name: key

extraDescr: It is a small, simple brass key with no inscriptions or marks of any kind.

name: potion green
longDescription: You see a green potion on the floor.

name: mail heavy banded

name: trident poseidon
longDescription: A huge three pronged spear lies here.

name: wild flowers
longDescription: A bunch of pretty wild flowers is here.

These wild flowers are really pretty.
Just like the flowers you would wear in your hair.

name: key
longDescription: A small brass key lies here.
extraDescr: It is a small, simple brass key with no inscriptions or marks of any kind.

name: gloves combat
shortDescription: a pair of minotaur combat gloves

extraDescr:
These gloves are plated with metal plates that provide strength and
protection.

name: bluish herbs
longDescription: Some bluish herbs are scattered here.

name: club large two-handed
longDescription: A large club sits here.

name: bow silver
longDescription: A silver bow.

name: amulet
longDescription: A strange looking amulet is lying here, half covered with dust.

Judging from the signs inscripted in the amulet, you gather it must
have belonged to a druid.  It is weird looking with symbols from nature
dominating it.

name: spiked armor garde
shortDescription: a suit of spiked garde armor
longDescription: A pile of spiked chainmail lies here.

name: purplish herbs
longDescription: Some purplish herbs are scattered here.

name: banana
longDescription: There is a banana here.

name: gauntlets flaming
longDescription: A pair of metal gauntlets flame here.

name: staff stick
longDescription: A staff with druidic marks have been left here.
extraDescr:
Then staff is about 5 ft long, engraved with mythical signs and figures.
Otherwise the staff seems of no real interest.

name: greaves black
shortDescription: a pair of black minotaur greaves
longDescription: Some black metal greaves lie here.

name: grayish herbs
longDescription: Some grayish herbs are scattered here.

name: life potion
longDescription: A potion of life healing has left here.

name: vial potion ambrosia
longDescription: A vial of ambrosia lies here.

name: rabbit roast wabbit
longDescription: You see a deliciously looking rabbit roast.
extraDescr:
Well the rabbit looks rather dead.
You guess that this once was a ferocious rabbit who's life now has
changed to that of a tasty wabbit woast.

name: vambraces black
shortDescription: a pair of black minotaur vambraces
longDescription: Some black metal vambraces lie here.

name: orangish herbs
longDescription: Some orangish herbs are scattered here.

name: club wooden
longDescription: A wooden club sits here.

name: necklace glowing
longDescription: A necklace with an inner glow lies here.

name: template scroll
longDescription: A strange template made of an exotic green metal is placed here
extraDescr:
The template is made of an exotic green metal and looks
centuries old.
Inscripted upon is the words 'Ep ep fi'hur G'harne
G'harne fhtagn Shudde-M'ell hyas Negg'h'
And beneath the inscription you see horrifying death scenes depicted.

name: rod weaponry
longDescription: A shiny metal rod lies here.

name: sword
longDescription: You see an imperial sword here.
extraDescr:
You see a sword of great craftsmanship.  Imprinted on the side is:
Merc Industries

name: ring sapphire
longDescription: A sapphire ring lies here.

name: club wooden
longDescription: A wooden club sits here.

name: potion clear
longDescription: A clear potion wrapped in leather is unnoticed placed here.
extraDescr:
The leather wrapped around the potion is old and decayed, originating
from an, to you, unknown creature.

As you examine the potion more, you notice the oddities of this
potion. When you look through it you notice strange things...
The clear potion is certainly not of this world.

name: cloak pitch black
longDescription: A pile of black cloth lies here.
extraDescr: It appears to have pockets inside it.

name: mace
longDescription: You see an imperial mace here.
extraDescr:
You see a mace of great craftsmanship.  Imprinted on the side is:
Merc Industries

name: shield glowing
longDescription: A shield lies here, filling the room with its aura.

name: scroll jhyfrdow
longDescription: An odd looking scroll is here.
extraDescr:
The drawing pictures people gathered round giant stone formations,
worshipping a giant worm like creature.
It seems they are sacrificing some of their own species.

The scroll is titled 'jhyfrdow' and looks very old.
As you examine it closer you notice primitive drawings of
men doing some kind of a ritual.

name: neckguard neck guard black plate
longDescription: A black plate collar rests here.

name: chest plate
longDescription: You see an imperial chest plate here.
extraDescr:
You see a chest plate of great craftsmanship.  Stamped on the side is:
Merc Industries

name: axe notched
longDescription: A notched axe.

name: imperial banner

extraDescr: This is the official Merc war banner to see you through the darkest realm!

name: girdle pouches many

name: mace huge mithril
longDescription: A huge mace made of mithril metal lies here.

name: symbol holy golden
longDescription: A small holy symbol on a golden chain lies here.

name: ring marble thick
longDescription: A thick ring made of marble

name: ring yellow green
longDescription: A ring, with yellow and green ornamentation. It looks very old.

name: bracelet thick marble
longDescription: A thick bracelet made of marble lies here.

name: corpse
longDescription: A halfway decayed corpse of a cartographer.
extraDescr:
Ew.  This must have been the mapper that was lost in Moria.  His rotted hand
still clutches a partially digested map...

name: boots striding
longDescription: A lithe pair of leather boots have been left here.
extraDescr: They look comfortable to walk in.

name: coins
longDescription: A small pile of coins.

name: cloak icy white
longDescription: A cold pile of white cloth lies here.
extraDescr: Smoke rises from it almost like it's made of dry ice.

name: dagger rusty
longDescription: A worn and rusty dagger is here.
extraDescr: It's old and rusted, but it still has a good edge.

name: staff ice
longDescription: A staff made of ice rests here.
extraDescr: The runes "FrIgID" are inscribed in the icy staff.

name: bullwhip whip
longDescription: A coiled length of leather is here...looks like a nasty whip!

name: ring carved wooden
longDescription: A wooden ring is on the floor.

name: axe hand
longDescription: A hand axe is on the floor here.
extraDescr:
You see a finely made axe.  Iron, with a nice wooden shaft, this axe can
withstand years of use.

name: club tree huge
longDescription: An uprooted tree leans against the wall.
extraDescr:
This is the biggest club you have ever seen!  The giant didn't even bother to
trim the roots off the end.

name: horn life
longDescription: A severed minotaur horn lies here.
extraDescr: The horn is capped at both ends with gold. Unreadable runes are scrawled on it.

name: meat cleaver
longDescription: A sharp meat cleaver is just lying on the floor here!
extraDescr: This meat cleaver is made of good steel.

name: furs smelly
longDescription: A heap of smelly furs sit here.
extraDescr:
They're heavy and smelly and would probably slow you down...but they do look
like good armor.

name: belt life
longDescription: A strange belt lies here.

name: side meat beef
longDescription: A side of beef is here on the floor.

name: potion purple
longDescription: A purple potion is here.

name: stone blood red
longDescription: A blood red stone lies here collecting dust.
extraDescr: The stone pulses with your own heart beat.

name: side meat pork
longDescription: A side of pork is here on the floor.

name: helmet metal
longDescription: A metal helmet is here.

name: crossbow huge
longDescription: A huge crossbow rests here.

name: side meat horse
longDescription: A side of horse is here on the floor.

name: egyptian mace
longDescription: A hierogylph-engraved mace has been left here.
extraDescr: The mace is formed from solid brass, and engraved in strange hieroglyphs.

name: mushroom
longDescription: A small mushroom is here.
extraDescr: Let's put it this way - I wouldn't eat it !

name: pack leather small
longDescription: A small leather pack rests here.
extraDescr: It looks pretty big on the inside.

name: meat chicken
longDescription: A defeathered chicken is here on the floor.

name: sand robes
longDescription: Sand-colored robes lie here.
extraDescr:
The robes are colored a sandy off-white, and are in fact caked and covered
with sand as well.  You don't seem to be able to remove all of the sand, no
matter how much you try.

name: dirk
longDescription: A beautifully crafted dirk is lying here.
extraDescr:
It's a medium sized, beautifully crafted dirk made from grey alloy.
Its blade is double-edged and very thin ... this looks like a good
thieves weapon.

name: hood black leather
longDescription: A hood made of black leather rests here.

name: emerald ring
longDescription: An emerald ring is on the floor, gathering dust.

name: obsidian dirk
longDescription: A flat dirk made of chipped obsidian lies here.
extraDescr: The blade of the dirk is black, glassy obsidian, chipped razor sharp.

name: axe war
longDescription: A razor-sharp war axe rests on the ground.
extraDescr: It has an edge sharp enough to cut a passing thought. A good find, this.

name: sleeves black leather
shortDescription: a pair of black leather sleeves
longDescription: Some leather sleeves lie here.

name: glass trinket
longDescription: A glass trinket is on the floor, gathering dust.

name: cloth turban
longDescription: A dirty cloth turban has been forgotten here.
extraDescr:
The turban used to be white cloth, now it is covered with oil and dirt from
the head and hair of its previous owner, who must not have bathed much.

name: sword broad
longDescription: A well-polished broadsword sits here.
extraDescr: It's much heavier than a long sword, but not as well balanced.

name: pants black leather
shortDescription: a pair of black leather pants
longDescription: Some leather pants lie here.

name: corpse cadaver
longDescription: A half eaten corpse is laying here

name: golden necklace
longDescription: A golden necklace is on the floor, gathering dust.

name: flail two two-headed
longDescription: A flail with two heavy, spiked heads is here.
extraDescr:
It's a stout wooden rod with two spiked balls attached, each weighing over 2
pounds.  It's a little worn for wear, but looks most painful.

name: cloth wrappings
longDescription: Long cloth wrappings lie on the ground in a pile.
extraDescr: The cloth wrappings are old, wrinkled, and stink of embalming fluid.

name: sword wicked short shortsword
longDescription: A wicked looking shortsword lies here.
extraDescr: It looks just perfect for backstabbing.

name: pile rotting heap bed
longDescription: There is a bed made of carnage here.

name: cabbage
longDescription: Some fresh cabbage is here, get it while it lasts!

name: mace heavy
longDescription: A large iron mace with a wicked head rests on the ground.
extraDescr: A metal shaft mounted with an iron head, shaped into armor-shattering form.

name: bottle fluid
longDescription: A dusty bottle lies here on the ground.
extraDescr: The bottle is dusty and the fluid has a strange sickly-sweet smell to it.

name: globe major
longDescription: A large globe rests here, pulsing uneasily.
extraDescr: Shimmering colors move inside the globe.

name: trollskin troll skin
longDescription: The filthy hide of a beast is laying here.
extraDescr:
This is the skin from a huge (and dead) beast.  It looks bad, smells bad,
and feels bad.

name: falchion sword
longDescription: A curved sword with a heavy tip sits here.
extraDescr:
It's curved like a scimitar, only with no recurved blade and a tip designed
for piercing as well as slashing.

name: lettuce
longDescription: Some fresh lettuce is here, get it while it lasts!

name: jar formaldehyde
longDescription: A small jar lies here on the ground.
extraDescr: The jar is sticky and smells really bad.

name: chain chainmail black suit
shortDescription: a suit of black minotaur chainmail
longDescription: A huge pile of black chainmail rests here.

name: ring opal
longDescription: A ring of black opal lies here gathering dust.
extraDescr: It is a full circle of opal, smooth and simple.

name: buckler spiked
longDescription: A small spiked buckler rests here.

name: voulge polearm
longDescription: A long polearm with a curved blade is here.
extraDescr:
It looks a lot like a staff with a pruning knife tied to the end, but it's
quite effective.

name: ball fire
shortDescription: a small hot ball of fire
longDescription: A little ball of fire hovers in the air before your eyes.
extraDescr: The ball of fire is hot to the touch and very very bright.

name: milk bottle
longDescription: A glass bottle of milk is on a shelf here, fresh from the cow.

name: leather belt
longDescription: An old leather belt is left on the floor.
extraDescr: This old, smelly belt looks like it is barely better than rotting cloth.

name: blade black demon
longDescription: An evil black demon blade is here.
extraDescr: You'll become as evil as the weapon, if you use it!

name: ring studded
longDescription: A small studded ring lies here.

name: stone scimitar
longDescription: A curved scimitar made of stone rests on the ground.
extraDescr:
The scimitar is formed from solid stone, chipped and carved to perfection,
with a sharp, cold blade that is marred only by a few nicks here and there.

name: apple
longDescription: An apple is on the ground.

name: bone cracked
longDescription: A cracked piece of bone lies here.
extraDescr:
This piece of bone looks sturdy enough to be used as a weapon, but you
wouldn't want to entrust your life to it.

name: gloves
longDescription: Some gloves are here.  They look like the right equipment for fighting.

name: stone key
longDescription: A stone key has been dropped here.
extraDescr: The key is made from stone, but is otherwise unremarkable.

name: helm horned
longDescription: A small horned helm rests here.

name: corn
longDescription: An ear of corn is on the ground.

name: barrel beer
longDescription: A beer barrel has been left here.

name: bone cracked
longDescription: A cracked piece of bone lies here.
extraDescr:
This piece of bone looks sturdy enough to be used as a weapon, but you
wouldn't want to entrust your life to it.

name: bunch berries smurfberries
longDescription: A bunch of delicious looking smurfberries lie here.

name: scroll ysafg
longDescription: A scroll which reads "ysafg", it looks very fragile and quite old.

name: stone sarcophagus
longDescription: A mighty stone sarcophagus lies in the center of the tomb.
extraDescr:
The sarcophagus is engraved on the sides with the images of pharoahs,
great wars fought long ago, mighty pyramids being constructed...

A raised image atop the sarcophagus is formed in the visage of one of
the mighty pharoahs, painted in gold and studded with precious gems.

You see a small keyhole in the side of the sarcophagus.

name: axe great
longDescription: An extremely huge axe is resting here.
extraDescr: The runes "DeAtH" are scrawled along the blade.

name: hay pile
longDescription: There is a big pile of hay here.

name: bottle beer
longDescription: A beer bottle has been left here.

name: glasses
longDescription: An odd pair of glasses has been left here.

name: plate ethereal suit
longDescription: A suit of shimmering plate rests here.
extraDescr: You can almost see through it.

name: dust
longDescription: A small pile of dust is being scattered by the breeze.
extraDescr:
The dust is old.  As you sift it through your hands you find tiny chips
of aged bone inside -- it must be the ancient remains of something.

name: slime mold
longDescription: A green slime mold is here. It smells REAL bad.
extraDescr: It wasn't meant to be food, - Certainly not for humans.

name: pitchfork fork
longDescription: A pitchfork is on the floor.

name: bottle ale
longDescription: A dark bottle of ale has been left here.

name: smurf hat
longDescription: A smurf hat has been left here.

name: helm ethereal
longDescription: A shimmering helm rests here.
extraDescr: You can almost see through it.

name: slime mold
longDescription: A green slime mold is here. It smells REAL bad.
extraDescr: It wasn't meant to be food, - Certainly not for humans.

name: scarab
longDescription: A small emerald scarab lies here on the ground.
extraDescr:
The scarab is intricately detailed, down to the tiny hairs on its
insectile legs and the faceting of the emeralds in its eyes.

name: vest
longDescription: A leather vest is on the floor.

name: bottle firebreather
longDescription: A bottle of firebreather has been left here.

name: axe small
longDescription: A small axe has been dropped here.

name: blade ethereal
longDescription: A shimmering blade lies here.
extraDescr: You can almost see through it.

name: staff iron iron-shod
longDescription: A long staff capped with iron leans against a wall.
extraDescr: It's a superb weapon for warrior or mage.

name: lamp
longDescription: A small, tarnished, battered lamp has been dropped here.
extraDescr:
The lamp is quite old and tarnished.  You rub at it to get some of the
grime off, but it doesn't seem like anybody is home.

name: sleeves
longDescription: Some leather sleeves are on the floor.

name: bottle local
longDescription: A dark bottle has been left here.

name: necklace
longDescription: A small necklace is lying on the ground.

name: black potion
longDescription: A thick black potion is here.

name: branch willow
longDescription: A small willow branch lies here.

name: ankh
longDescription: A small brass ankh has been left here.
extraDescr:
The ankh is a small brass symbol of an ancient religion.
It glows with a soft bright light that is soothing to you.

name: leggings
longDescription: Some leather leggings are on the floor.

name: scimitar blade
longDescription: Hassan's scimitar lies upon the ground, waiting for its owner.
extraDescr:
It is quite heavy.  The blade is made of some metal that you can't even
spell.  The edge of the blade looks as if it could cut through anything
or anyone.

name: pink potion
longDescription: A pink potion is barely visible on the ground.

name: staff oak
longDescription: A ancient heavy oak staff is here.
extraDescr: You see it has some sort of runes on it.

name: key keep
longDescription: A small key lies here.

name: book riddles
longDescription: A medium-sized parchment book with well-worn pages lies here.
extraDescr:
The book has well-worn pages, containing many befuddling riddles
to surprise, confuse, and amuse you.  You find yourself bewildered
by its contents and put it down to sort your head out.

name: boots
longDescription: Some leather boots are on the floor.

name: stone
longDescription: Somebody left their Clan Stone here.

name: wand
longDescription: A small wand lies on the ground.

name: dagger light silver
longDescription: A light silver dagger is here.
extraDescr: It looks like an excellent weapon for thieves.

name: key red
longDescription: A small red key lies here.

name: lion paw
longDescription: The mighty paw of a lion-like creature has been dropped here.
extraDescr:
The massive paw has straps on it formed of bronze, so that it will
fit snugly over your hand.  As you put it on, it melds with your hand,
becoming an extension of your arm.

name: signet ring
longDescription: A shiny ring of gold is in the dirt.

name: mace sub merc
longDescription: You see a sub issue mace here.
extraDescr:
You see a mace of great but cheap craftsmanship.  Imprinted on the side is:
Merc Industries

name: potpie pot pie
longDescription: A big pot pie has been left here.

name: key
longDescription: A tiny key is lying on the ground.

name: key black
longDescription: A small black key lies here.

name: star morning morningstar
longDescription: A heavy, spiked morning star is here.
extraDescr:
It's a huge length of wood studded with iron spikes and bands. You wouldn't
want to meet this in a dark alley...

name: answer
longDescription: A small piece of parchment covered in hieroglyphics lies here.
extraDescr:
You cannot decipher the strange hieroglyphics that cover the
sheet of parchment.

name: plate brass
longDescription: A pile of brass plates is against the wall here.

name: dagger sub merc
longDescription: You see a sub issue dagger here.
extraDescr:
You see a dagger of great but cheap craftsmanship.  Imprinted on the side is:
Merc Industries

name: pit
longDescription: A pit for sacrifices is in front of the altar.
extraDescr:
This is where you put money and items to help Doz expand this shrine and
convert more people to the belief of Mota, lord of the gods.

name: well
longDescription: A small smurfy well is here.

name: key white
longDescription: A small white key lies here.

name: treasure
longDescription: The massive treasure of the sphinx lies here in a big pile.
extraDescr:
The treasure is incredibly large, filled with gold coins and valuables, more
wealth than you could ever possibly imagine accumulated in one place.

name: map moria second
shortDescription: a map of the second level of Moria
longDescription: A rolled up map is here.
extraDescr:

longDescription: A black-hilted sword with engravings on the blade lies here.
extraDescr:
The blade of the sword is a full meter long and straight as an arrow, with
lightly-fluted sides.  Both edges are keened down to perfect lines, invisibly
sharp.  Perfection like this could have only been forged by a god.  The black
hilt is contrasted only by the faint symbol of a white arrow.
Upon the blade is engraved a poem:

Farslayer howls across the world
For thy heart, for thy heart, who hast wronged me!
Vengeance is his who casts the blade
Yet he will in the end no triumph see.
